name: Irish Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Brown sugar; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Pour Irish whiskey into a coffee mug. Fill with black coffee and stir until brown sugar is dissolved.
Spray a generous amount of whipped dessert topping (the canned, pressurized topping is easiest to use) on top of the coffee.
Trickle creme de menthe over the whipped topping to form green stripes.
Place the cherry on top.
Serve immediately.
